https://doi.org/10.1017/lsi.2021.56 Published online by Cambridge University Press
                                                                                            From Dataﬁcation to Data State         1159

Despite its convenience, the mobile payment system documents how users spend their
                    time and money. In addition, facial recognition technology is widely used in China, for
                    a variety of things from access to the subway system to determining eligibility for online
                    mobile services (Xie 2019). Businesses and public services are cultivating in Chinese
                    citizens the habit of allowing their behaviors to be “dataﬁed.” Against this background,
                    the SCS is expanding the boundaries of behavior capture.

Dominance of the Data Self over the Bio-self
